title: disa obtusa subsp. obtusa
intro: Disa obtusa subsp. obtusa, commonly known as the Cape disa, is a terrestrial orchid species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Disa obtusa subsp. obtusa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, particularly skin conditions and respiratory issues.
